title: Kimi K2.7 Code: THIS is VERY CRAZY MAN!
summary: Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source coding-focused agentic model with Mixture-of-Experts architecture and one trillion parameters. The Kimi Code CLI enables terminal-based repository exploration, file editing, and test execution with plan mode for codebase investigation.
writeup: The video covers Moonshot AI's release of Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source coding model built on a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with one trillion parameters. It walks through the Kimi Code CLI, which handles terminal-based repository exploration, file editing, and test execution, and includes a plan mode for investigating a codebase before making changes. The takeaways: the model targets agentic coding workflows, and its open-source status and CLI tooling make it usable directly from the terminal.
